{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175642722A9AE1BE1A7A004695"}"},"total":946},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7446083959616521022","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常经典的有主世界的综漫无限流，缝了挺多的，但没有很乱。男主正常直男，在一些设定上很讨喜。多女主，真的很有当年在同人小说网上，看副本流同人的感觉。希望后面能稳一点。
我个人觉得真的挺不错的，番茄这种文太少了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733686755,"group_id":"7396143055205567550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱修罗场，也爱异能，更爱综漫同人含妖怪元素","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0g/+RCzaUmrPL0jtRyIZkU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8016269601a2431f88a365251f92ada1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531986&x-signature=mzwC1%2F2KtFHHkZYlmqDCNXAGcmA%3D","user_id":"233523118351421","user_name":"怪砂白糖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"233523118351421","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396143055205567550","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫+乐园+养成+多女主］
千叶街头霓虹灯闪烁，居酒屋里传来相亲失败的悲鸣。
虽然明朝依旧强盛，虽然穿越到霓虹省已有十八年的徐伦从未听到过关于澳洲和非洲的信息，虽然身边时不时就会冒出奇怪作品里的角色，但他始终认为这就是个综漫日常世界而已！
直到这一天的意外后：
［预备玩家徐伦］
［即将为你开启试炼任务］
［乐园在此提前恭喜你］
［欢迎加入这场伟大的进化］
“为什么我的日常生活会有乐园啊！”
既然如此，想考东大的他也只好高举至高天国
俯瞰乐园无限世界的风景了。
（主世界：春物，米拉夫人，邻家天使，看得见女孩，鹿乃子等）
（乐园世界：学园默示录，鬼灭之刃，fate，海贼王，漫威DC……）
本书又名：救命，我的生活被问题少女包围了；生活在综漫世界的我误入进化乐园；达尔文是只卷毛狒狒是不是搞错了点什么；想考东大的我却在乐园大开杀戒……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/81aa7c562d21e6937a4bf71c3cc11bde","author":"闪光母怪力","author_id":"","book_id":"7396143055205567550","book_name":"我的综漫日常怎么会有乐园啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8d0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7396143095374430782","read_count":"31047","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1760121"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"859","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,多女主,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/601d53958efd95d0c58ca420cad3ee63~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184602&x-signature=NnsNHfOlgBnDAVCLSBqpeETUvcE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3664028284757031","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201756 642722A9AE1BE1A7A004695"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读33小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":118979,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4406},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468961663031968574","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这绝对是番茄综漫的巅峰之作之一，设定严谨，作者也巨有脑洞，并且涉及到的世界很广（并不只有动漫也包含一些网文），关键是这本书并不只是单纯的跟着某个番的剧情走，它有自己的一条世界线，让人猜不出后续剧情，这是我觉得最好的一点。而且主角基本是全收，让人看得爽。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739006641,"group_id":"7396143055205567550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"路虽远，行必至","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+QwbNt+CcTbU+U9OkuBODs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1b546e7237bb427d81b247701e0ad552~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532933&x-signature=phCvjlxx%2Br%2BDO1nG5O%2BB%2Bdyy7EM%3D","user_id":"101327765009","user_name":"宅天上"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101327765009","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396143055205567550","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫+乐园+养成+多女主］
